prompt: Build a counter component that shows a number starting at 0, with +1 and -1 buttons that update the number when clicked.
Render a toggle switch (on/off) that visually flips state and updates its color when clicked.
Build a button labeled 'Hover me' that shows a tooltip with the text 'Hello' above it when hovered or focused.
Build an 'Open dialog' button that opens a modal overlay with a title, body text, and a 'Close' button that dismisses it.
Build a 3-item accordion. Each header expands and collapses its content on click; multiple items may be open at once.
Render 5 star icons in a row. Clicking a star fills it and all stars to its left, representing a rating.
Build a horizontal range slider with values 0 to 100 and a label that updates to show the current value as the user drags.
Build a 6-color palette grid. Clicking a swatch highlights it as selected and updates a preview box's background color.
Render a static login form with an email input, a password input, and a 'Sign in' button. No submission logic needed.
Build a search input that filters and shows a list of 6 hard-coded fruit names as the user types.
Build a tag input: a text field where pressing Enter adds the typed word as a removable tag chip below.
Render a static date input field with placeholder 'YYYY-MM-DD' and a calendar icon to its right.
Build a settings page with 3 sections (Profile, Notifications, Display). Each section contains 2 to 3 toggles or selects. No persistence required.
Build a signup form with email and password fields. Show an inline error under email if it's not a valid format on blur, and disable the submit button until both fields are non-empty.
Build a drag-and-drop file upload zone with a dashed border. Accept drops, list dropped file names below with size, and a per-file remove button.
Render a hero section with a centered headline 'Welcome', a subheading paragraph, and a single 'Get started' button.
Render a page footer with three columns of links (4 links each) and a copyright line below.
Render an empty-state placeholder with a centered icon (emoji is fine), a 'No items yet' heading, and a CTA button.
Render 3 placeholder skeleton cards. Each is a rectangle with two gray bars inside. No animation needed.
Render a user profile card with an avatar placeholder image, name, role, and a 'Follow' button that toggles to 'Following' when clicked.
Render a 3-column grid of 6 product cards. Each card has an image placeholder, title, price, and 'Add to cart' button.
Render a two-column layout: left sidebar with 5 nav items, right main area with a heading and a paragraph of lorem ipsum.
Build a single-page marketing site with a sticky nav at top, hero, a 3-feature section, a testimonial block, and a footer.
Render a horizontal row of 8 colored badges with labels like 'Beta', 'New', 'Pro', 'Featured'.
Render a row of 6 circular avatar placeholder images with overlapping spacing showing recent active users.
Build an FAQ list with 5 questions. Clicking a question expands or collapses its answer below.
Build a todo list: text input at top, 'Add' button, list below. Each todo has a 'Done' checkbox and a 'Delete' button.
Render a vertical timeline of 5 events. Each event has a date on the left, a dot in the middle, and a description on the right.
Build a comment thread with 3 top-level comments and 2 nested replies under the second comment. Each comment shows author, timestamp, and body.
Build a chat UI: scrollable message list with alternating left/right alignment per sender, sender name, timestamp, and a text input plus send button at bottom that appends a new message on click.
Render a yellow warning banner at the top with an icon, message text, and a dismiss 'x' button.
Render a 3x3 thumbnail image gallery (use placeholder image URLs). Clicking a thumbnail highlights it with a border.
Render an audio player UI: album art placeholder on left, song title, artist, play/pause button (toggles icon), and a progress bar visualization at the bottom.
Render a video player UI: large video area placeholder, controls bar with play/pause button, progress bar, time display, volume icon, fullscreen icon. No actual playback needed.
Render a code editor UI: line numbers gutter on left, code area on right with at least 10 lines, a language tab at top, and faux syntax highlighting using colored spans.
Render a top navigation bar with logo on left, 4 menu links in center, and a 'Sign in' button on right.
Render a breadcrumb showing 'Home > Products > Electronics > Headphones' with '>' separators.
Render pagination controls: prev arrow, pages '1 2 3 ... 10', next arrow. The current page (3) is visually highlighted.
Build a 3-tab interface (Overview, Details, Reviews). Clicking a tab highlights it and shows its corresponding panel; only one panel visible at a time.
Build a dropdown menu: a 'Menu' button that toggles a 4-item list below it on click. Clicking outside or selecting an item closes it.
Build a 4-step horizontal stepper. 'Next' button advances to the next step; 'Back' returns. Show current step visually with a filled circle vs empty circles.
Build a 3-column kanban board (To Do / In Progress / Done) with 2 to 3 cards per column. Cards can be moved between columns by clicking a 'Next' button on each card.
Render a horizontal progress bar at 65% completion with a percentage label inside or beside it.
Render a bar chart placeholder: 5 vertical bars of varying heights with axis labels A, B, C, D, E and a title above.
Render a green success toast notification at the bottom-right with a checkmark icon and 'Saved!' text.
Render a 3-tier pricing table (Basic, Pro, Enterprise). Each column shows price, 4 feature bullets, and a CTA button. The middle tier is highlighted.
Render a scoreboard showing 2 teams ('Team A: 24' and 'Team B: 18') with a 'Quarter 3' indicator and a time-remaining display '04:32'.
Render a 4-column data table (Name, Email, Role, Status) with 8 rows of sample user data. Header row is styled distinctly; rows alternate background colors.
Build a markdown preview pane that takes raw markdown text from a textarea and renders it (headings, bold, italic, lists, code) live in a side preview as the user types.
Render a monthly calendar grid for the current month. Show day-of-week headers, all dates in a 7-column grid, highlight today, and visually mark a sample 'event' on 3 different dates.
